title: Deleting a row
prompt_md: Delete the seat with `id` `9` from the `seats` table. Return its `label` with `RETURNING`.
starter_code: DELETE FROM seats WHERE id = 9 RETURNING label;
hints: `DELETE FROM table WHERE ...` removes matching rows.
Like UPDATE, a `DELETE` without `WHERE` wipes the whole table — always filter.
reference_solution: DELETE FROM seats WHERE id = 9 RETURNING label;
